import React from 'react'; const icons = [ // Dumbbell { id: 'dumbbell', svg: ( )}, // Running figure { id: 'runner', svg: ( )}, // Apple { id: 'apple', svg: ( )}, // Heart { id: 'heart', svg: ( )}, // Broccoli { id: 'broccoli', svg: ( )}, // Weightlifter silhouette { id: 'lifter', svg: ( )}, // Jump rope { id: 'jumprope', svg: ( )}, // Stopwatch { id: 'stopwatch', svg: ( )}, // Barbell squat { id: 'squat', svg: ( )}, // Plank figure { id: 'plank', svg: ( )}, // Carrot { id: 'carrot', svg: ( )}, // Plan clipboard { id: 'plan', svg: ( )}, ]; // Fixed positions matching the prototype layout const positions = [ // Top row { icon: 'lifter', top: '3%', left: '1%', size: 70, rot: -5, opacity: 0.55 }, { icon: 'heart', top: '2%', left: '14%', size: 44, rot: 0, opacity: 0.45 }, { icon: 'dumbbell', top: '6%', left: '26%', size: 58, rot: -20, opacity: 0.4 }, { icon: 'broccoli', top: '3%', left: '62%', size: 42, rot: 8, opacity: 0.38 }, { icon: 'dumbbell', top: '8%', left: '74%', size: 50, rot: 15, opacity: 0.42 }, { icon: 'lifter', top: '2%', left: '88%', size: 72, rot: 5, opacity: 0.55 }, // Left column { icon: 'heart', top: '22%', left: '1%', size: 46, rot: 0, opacity: 0.5, color: '#C0392B' }, { icon: 'dumbbell', top: '28%', left: '10%', size: 54, rot: -10, opacity: 0.38 }, { icon: 'apple', top: '36%', left: '2%', size: 42, rot: 5, opacity: 0.4 }, { icon: 'plan', top: '50%', left: '8%', size: 52, rot: 0, opacity: 0.42 }, { icon: 'stopwatch', top: '58%', left: '1%', size: 44, rot: -8, opacity: 0.38 }, { icon: 'dumbbell', top: '43%', left: '18%', size: 40, rot: 30, opacity: 0.3 }, // Right column { icon: 'broccoli', top: '22%', left: '84%', size: 44, rot: 10, opacity: 0.38 }, { icon: 'dumbbell', top: '30%', left: '74%', size: 52, rot: -15, opacity: 0.4 }, { icon: 'apple', top: '40%', left: '88%', size: 42, rot: -5, opacity: 0.4 }, { icon: 'heart', top: '52%', left: '76%', size: 46, rot: 0, opacity: 0.5, color: '#C0392B' }, { icon: 'dumbbell', top: '60%', left: '88%', size: 50, rot: 20, opacity: 0.38 }, { icon: 'broccoli', top: '48%', left: '68%', size: 38, rot: -12, opacity: 0.32 }, // Center scattered (away from card) { icon: 'carrot', top: '35%', left: '30%', size: 36, rot: 15, opacity: 0.3 }, { icon: 'dumbbell', top: '55%', left: '36%', size: 48, rot: -5, opacity: 0.32 }, { icon: 'broccoli', top: '48%', left: '52%', size: 38, rot: 8, opacity: 0.3 }, { icon: 'apple', top: '62%', left: '58%', size: 36, rot: -10, opacity: 0.3 }, { icon: 'stopwatch', top: '38%', left: '60%', size: 40, rot: 12, opacity: 0.28 }, // Bottom row — silhouettes { icon: 'jumprope', top: '76%', left: '2%', size: 52, rot: 0, opacity: 0.55 }, { icon: 'lifter', top: '74%', left: '12%', size: 62, rot: 0, opacity: 0.55 }, { icon: 'squat', top: '72%', left: '24%', size: 66, rot: 0, opacity: 0.55 }, { icon: 'runner', top: '74%', left: '36%', size: 56, rot: 0, opacity: 0.55 }, { icon: 'plank', top: '78%', left: '48%', size: 60, rot: 0, opacity: 0.6 }, { icon: 'squat', top: '74%', left: '60%', size: 62, rot: 0, opacity: 0.55 }, { icon: 'lifter', top: '72%', left: '72%', size: 64, rot: 0, opacity: 0.55 }, { icon: 'runner', top: '76%', left: '84%', size: 56, rot: 0, opacity: 0.55 }, ]; export default function FitnessBackground() { const iconMap = Object.fromEntries(icons.map(i => [i.id, i.svg])); return (
{positions.map((p, i) => (
